content:
Administrative Agency: Rochelle Police Dept Incident #: 200600011585 Report No. 3 Entered: 10/05/2006 08:51 By Officer: 00000208 Detective Terry Inman
Case_Nr:
Wednesday 10/4/06 I (Detective Terry Inman) met with
d his mother Guadalupe.
I escorted them to the interview room and advised f his rights under Miranda using this Department's "Statement of Rights and Waiver" form. (retained in his file) stated that he understood his rights and initialed and signed the form where indicated. His mother also signed the waiver form.
I asked to tell me what happened on the 22nd of September. According to he went with · and
driving around town throwing eggs at cars. He admitted that they did throw eggs at cars on Irene Ave. but could not remember or identify any cars that they threw eggs at. I asked him who threw eggs and he stated everyone: I asked him if there was anything else to add and he stated that there was nothing else.
At this time I put on 90 days police supervision with the standard conditions. I added 15 hours of community service to be done at the high school with Keith Lamb. I told him that I would notify Keith and tell him what was going on.
Neither
nor his mother had any questions for me.
I escorted them back to the front lobby and gave them a copy of the supervision agreement. I called Keith Lamb and left a message for him about this and asked him to call me if he had any questions.
Detective Terry Inman #208 :selected:
